methodology.title: How we verify suppliers
methodology.subtitle: Transparency in our methodology builds trust. Here's how we ensure data integrity.
methodology.step1.title: Data collection
methodology.step1.desc: We aggregate supplier data from trade registries, certifications, and verified business sources. Continuously refreshed global supplier graph.
methodology.step2.title: Verification
methodology.step2.desc: Each supplier undergoes business registration checks, trade history validation, and compliance review. Registry-backed, compliance-grade.
methodology.step3.title: Quality scoring
methodology.step3.desc: Our algorithms score suppliers on response time, certification level, and buyer feedback. AI-ranked, high-signal.
methodology.step4.title: Ongoing monitoring
methodology.step4.desc: We continuously monitor risk signals and update supplier status based on real-time data. Verified, registry-backed intelligence.
integrationsPage.title: Connect SmartSeek with Your Stack
integrationsPage.subtitle: Sync suppliers, RFQs, and landed costs with your procurement and ERP systems. One-click OAuth, secure API, and pre-built connectors.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Connect your existing procurement tools. Data stays in sync automatically.
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Select SAP Ariba, Oracle, Salesforce, or others from the list.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: OAuth 2.0 flow—no passwords shared. Enterprise SSO supported.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Suppliers, RFQs, and cost data flow between systems in real time.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: SOC 2 certified. Data encrypted in transit and at rest. No credentials stored.

home.features.title: Built for the moments that matter most in procurement
home.feat1.quote: "We spend 3 weeks cold-emailing suppliers who never respond — and still end up with the wrong ones."
home.feat1.title: Find verified suppliers in seconds
home.feat1.desc: Government-registry verified contacts across {{suppliers}} suppliers. No bounced emails. No dead leads.
home.feat1.b2: Filter by cert, country, MOQ, employees
home.feat2.quote: "We budgeted $42k. The invoice said $61k. The difference was duties we didn't know existed."
home.feat2.title: Know your real cost before you commit
home.feat2.desc: Duties, freight, insurance, port fees, VAT — calculated upfront. No surprises when the container arrives.
home.feat2.b1: HS code lookup & live duty rates
home.feat3.quote: "Our top supplier was in a region that went unstable. We had no backup plan and lost 6 weeks of production."
home.feat3.title: Spot supplier risk before it costs you
home.feat3.desc: AI risk scores for every supplier and region. Geopolitical flags. Alternative sourcing routes identified automatically.
home.pain.stat1desc: Average time procurement teams waste on manual supplier research
home.pain.stat2desc: Estimated annual loss per company from hidden import costs and poor supplier choices
home.pain.stat3desc: Average cost reduction reported by SmartSeek users in their first 90 days
home.pain.footnote: SmartSeek users go from 14 hours of weekly research to under 2. That's 12 hours back — every single week.
